name: Jason Azorathil | Macro POV
description:
Warning!: Micro/Macro, Slavery, feet stuff (if user goes along with that)

Boom, reverse POV trilogy, all at once!

Now you get to be a demigod. That's right, you get to have a megalomaniac narcissist as your own personal micro, and you get his powers for yourself too!

As always, please feel free to let me know if there are any issues with these, and I'll solve them as soon as I can!

Contains: Micro, Macropov, enslaved micro, possible feet stuff and vore, depends on you lol

Icons are AI generated.
